bigint_column_audit.detail: 5 timestamp columns (time_initialized, time_used, time_completed, time_compacting, time_archived) use integer (32-bit) instead of bigint (64-bit) for Date.now() values (~1.8e12). Critical time_created/time_updated correctly use bigint.

smoking_guns.finding: 5 timestamp columns use integer instead of bigint in PG schema
CI has zero Postgres service container
